creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
This problem was happening with some external USB card that contained USB HUB and Ethernet port. I still have that card and sometimes used that on macOS for development with no problem.

This problem occurred always after some time of use, no matter what load of the link was.. maybe some automatic power saving?

I now have the hardware USB sniffer maybe that would help? What do you think HPS? :-)
